//: SPA fallback. React Router owns every route on the client, so any request that doesn't map to a static asset must serve index.html and let the client render the correct view. Without this, refreshing /admin or sharing a deep link returns a 404.
//headers: Cache immutable hashed bundles aggressively, and ensure index.html is always fresh so users pick up new deploys immediately. This is the behavior GitHub Pages couldn't give us.
